description: E-commerce service contract v1 — 40 operations across catalog, orders, customers, inventory, and write-gated mutations. Targets platforms like Shopify, WooCommerce, and BigCommerce.

operations.description: Shop identity, currency, locale, and account metadata
operations.name: shop_info

operations.description: List catalog products with pagination
operations.name: products

operations.description: Fetch a single product by ID or handle
operations.name: product

operations.description: List orders with filters (status, date range)
operations.name: orders

operations.description: Fetch a single order by ID
operations.name: order

operations.description: List customers with pagination
operations.name: customers

operations.description: Fetch a single customer by ID or email
operations.name: customer

operations.description: Read inventory levels by SKU or location
operations.name: inventory

operations.description: Search products by query, tag, vendor, or collection
operations.name: search_products

operations.description: Search orders by customer, product, status, or tag
operations.name: search_orders

operations.description: Search customers by name, email, or tag
operations.name: search_customers

operations.description: List inventory locations (warehouses, stores)
operations.name: locations

operations.description: List product collections or categories
operations.name: collections

operations.description: Fetch a single collection by ID or handle
operations.name: collection

operations.description: List fulfillment records for an order
operations.name: fulfillments

operations.description: List active discount codes and rules
operations.name: discounts

operations.description: Read custom metadata attached to resources
operations.name: metafields

operations.description: List registered webhook subscriptions
operations.name: webhooks

operations.description: Read aggregate sales, traffic, or conversion metrics
operations.name: analytics

operations.description: Create a new product collection
operations.name: create_collection

operations.description: List products within a collection
operations.name: collection_products

operations.description: Mark an order line as fulfilled
operations.name: create_fulfillment

operations.description: Attach or update a tracking number on a fulfillment
operations.name: update_tracking

operations.description: Create a new discount code or rule
operations.name: create_discount

operations.description: Write a metafield value on a resource
operations.name: set_metafield

operations.description: Verify a received webhook signature against the shop secret
operations.name: verify_webhook

operations.description: Create a new product
operations.name: create_product

operations.description: Update an existing product
operations.name: update_product

operations.description: Delete a product
operations.name: delete_product

operations.description: Update order fields (notes, tags, shipping)
operations.name: update_order

operations.description: Cancel an order
operations.name: cancel_order

operations.description: Close an order (archive)
operations.name: close_order

operations.description: Create a new customer record
operations.name: create_customer

operations.description: Update an existing customer
operations.name: update_customer

operations.description: Apply a delta to inventory at a location
operations.name: adjust_inventory

operations.description: Set absolute inventory at a location
operations.name: set_inventory

operations.description: Delete a discount code or rule
operations.name: delete_discount

operations.description: Delete a metafield from a resource
operations.name: delete_metafield

operations.description: Register a new webhook subscription
operations.name: create_webhook

operations.description: Remove a webhook subscription
operations.name: delete_webhook

title: ecommerce-v1
